chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.D-634 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 19.11.2025 Mr. Sandeep Kumar Maheshwari advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Pir Ali Raza XEN PHE Sanghar. The case of the petitioner is that her husband namely Atta Hussain was serving as Chowkidar in Public Health Engineering & Rural Development Department at PHE Division Sanghar, who passed away on 21.08.2024 and after death of her husband, the family pension has yet not been released to her. The District Accounts Officer has submitted report to the effect that the relevant documents in favour of petitioner have been received by his office on 17.11.2025. Further stated that as per Circular issued by the office of the Accountant General Sindh, Karachi dated 06.11.2025, the SAP Server is down, which as and when is activated the family pension would be disbursed accordingly. Petitioner’s counsel is satisfied with such statement and seeks disposal of the petition. Petitioner’s counsel is satisfied with such statement and seeks disposal of the petition in that terms. Without touching the merits of the case, the instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
